endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Peering/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available API operations for peering resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/legacyPeerings
endpoints.description: Lists all of the legacy peerings under the given subscription matching the specified kind and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peerAsns
endpoints.description: Lists all of the peer ASNs under the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peerAsns/{peerAsnName}
endpoints.description: Gets the peer ASN with the specified name under the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERASNNAME}} with a real peerasnname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peerAsns/{peerAsnName}
endpoints.description: Creates a new peer ASN or updates an existing peer ASN with the specified name under the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERASNNAME}} with a real peerasnname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peerAsns/{peerAsnName}
endpoints.description: Deletes an existing peer ASN with the specified name under the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERASNNAME}} with a real peerasnname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringLocations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available peering locations for the specified kind of peering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServiceLocations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available peering service locations for the specified kind of peering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServiceProviders
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available peering service locations for the specified kind of peering.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices
endpoints.description: Lists all of the peerings under the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peerings
endpoints.description: Lists all of the peerings under the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices
endpoints.description: Lists all of the peering services under the given subscription and resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}
endpoints.description: Gets an existing peering service with the specified name under the given subscription and resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}
endpoints.description: Creates a new peering service or updates an existing peering with the specified name under the given subscription and resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}
endpoints.description: Deletes an existing peering service with the specified name under the given subscription and resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}
endpoints.description: Updates tags for a peering service with the specified name under the given subscription and resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}/prefixes
endpoints.description: Lists the peerings prefix in the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}/prefixes/{prefixName}
endpoints.description: Gets the peering service prefix.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{PREFIXNAME}} with a real prefixname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}/prefixes/{prefixName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the peering prefix.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{PREFIXNAME}} with a real prefixname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peeringServices/{peeringServiceName}/prefixes/{prefixName}
endpoints.description: removes the peering prefix.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGSERVICENAME}} with a real peeringservicename. Replace {{PREFIXNAME}} with a real prefixname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Peering/peerings
endpoints.description: Lists all of the peerings under the given subscription and resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
